item.title: Weight loss progress
item.description: So I had a dif account, it's your local shrinking fat girl but it started to give me issues so I'm back to this old one. Basically, I weighed 500lbs. Then 9mos ago, I got weight loss surgery. And lost 270 of them. This is what 9mo of HARD work looks like for me and my body. I had some issues, over coming over corrective anorexia that put me in the hospital. Everyone has there own time line and own struggles. Those were mine. But hurdles are a part of this beautiful, rewarding, Self affirming journey But in addition to how I look. I feel GOOD. And not just physically. I have a diffrent mindset. I'm not lazy and incapable like I thought myself to be. I stopped biting my nails started learning French and the ukelele. I also quit drinking cold turkey 2 years ago. Im planning a trip abroad. Spending a month living, Spain, France, and the UK. for a month each. I'm training to participate ina 5k next spring. I want to live a full life. Rather. I NEED to. I am now every time I look in the mirror. I am made to see that I am a driven ambitions person, with real goals I CAN achieve or else how would I get here? I still have insecure moments. Who doesn't? But I can finally say, I truly love myself most days. It used to be self loathing with a nice day or two mixed in. And I don't love me just cause I look a bit better to my own minds eye. I love even my former self because they sent me on this path. I love myself enough to try and heal my body. To correct my mistakes. To build a future now that I may have one after all. 500-229 and counting ? Quick edit. I phrased the loss wrong. I lost 80lbs pre surgery and 192 post surgery. I didn't loose the whole 270 in 9mos. I alreay almost died undereating and getting down to 192 that fast. By the way. I encourage no one to follow my example on that front. I would say my example in learning healthy foods, meal prepping moderating intake etc. and getting thru any hurdle you have. Whether part of you hard work is over coming under eating post surgery like me. Or overeating, or learning your new body. Our struggles are part of the learning process and certainly part of the hard work we put in.
item.dc:creator: Littlemisselle

item.title: Found A "Yooperlite"
item.description: "Yooperlite" on Lake Superior! – These rocks are sodalite in syenite and the sodalite part glows when a long wave UV light is shined onto them! Hunting these is so much fun!! – By: Thecrystalcollector – Bryan Major #rocks #awesome #aww #nature #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Trainers quick reaction probably saved this horses life!
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Ro Khanna did a funny.
item.description: Excerpt: Representative Ro Khanna (D‑CA) has announced plans to force a vote in the House of Representatives demanding the full, unredacted release of all documents related to disgraced financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. In a post on X, formerly Twitter, Khanna said he will introduce an amendment this week that would require the House Speaker to bring the measure to a roll-call vote, putting every member of Congress on the record. Newsweek contacted Khanna's team via email and House Speaker Mike Johnson via online form for comment outside of usual working hours on Sunday. Source: https://www.newsweek.com/democrat-ro-khanna-demands-vote-release-full-jeffrey-epstein-files-2098309
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: LAST CALL to sign the Stop Killing Games UK Petition
item.description: 14 July 2025 is the deadline for the Stop Killing Games petition to the UK Parliament. That means there are less than two days left to sign. https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/702074/ This petition asks to "prohibit publishers irrevocably disabling video games they have already sold". It managed to pass the 100k threshold needed for discussion, but more votes signal a stronger intent. Currently, it there are just over 185k signatures. Can we get the total over 200k?
item.dc:creator: The11thPlague

item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: Body Painted The Scream on myself - MCroft07
item.description: Thought I would add in more of my smaller paints to the timeline on here, hope you all like that too ? I paint them all live on twitch, thank you to those of you who have come over and said hello :) it's really kind! So many of you have wondered, but I do this full time. I wouldn't classify myself as an "influencer" but I am a full time professional twitch streamer/broadcaster. I do around 4-5 of these paints Inc a body paint per week, I'll forever be grateful that for a portion of my life I was able to work as a full time artist. So thank you for enjoying my artwork, it's ephemeral but that just makes me enjoy small moments of life a lot more and I hope it does for you too. At the moment I am trying to grow Bok Choy and learn piano (again) in my spare time and it is very rewarding ??
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: It's been...one week since you looked at me...
item.description:
Woke up and Frank was already off exploring. But puddles was here.
So was Chessie.
Frank came ambling by after he saw me awake, and we all watched Chessie explore a bit.
Frank loves tails
Bonus video of puddles teaching Frank about boundaries. It's a lazy Sunday. We don't have anything planned. Might play some video games, probably clean the bathrooms and kitchen. Hope you all have a great day.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Comrades!
item.description: Every time someone says they love our webcomic but don't join our Patreon, we add another cup of coffee to the day's intake and another character with existential dread to the storyline. We're currently at dangerous levels of both caffeine and narrative despair. Save our hearts and our plot arcs with a small monthly contribution. Bonus content includes characters who occasionally experience joy. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #163
item.description: ?️ Trump built internment camps while his MAGA base discovered he's been lying to them all along. The Epstein files they obsessed over? Trump now says Obama and Clinton wrote 'em. And now there are threats about exiling citizens, sending deportees to countries they've never been to without trials, and internment camps in five more states. MAGA voters believed they were voting against government telling them what to do, and clearly they did just the opposite. 56,000 Americans have already signed up for Thursday's resistance rallies because they can see the pattern. You should join them, but make plans now because it's the middle of a traditional workday. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/eu-mexico-tariffs 2. https://go.govbrief.today/exile-to-third-countries 3. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-head-no-show 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-illegally-revoke-citizenship 5. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-ramps-up-drones 6. https://go.govbrief.today/bondi-distracts-drops-vaccine-charge 7. https://go.govbrief.today/more-trump-prosecutors-fired 8. https://go.govbrief.today/lawmakers-everglades-internment-camp 9. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-5-states-internment 10. https://go.govbrief.today/presidential-fellow-alums-lobby-congress 11. https://go.govbrief.today/bongino-bondi-epstein-schism Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-superman-poster Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/good-trouble-coming-thursday Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Wonderful human shows off incredible skills crafting stunning portraits..
item.dc:creator: HugglySynLynch

item.title: We slip beneath the pillow's spell - And drift from heaven and into hell
item.description:
To lose control of conscious mind The secrets of our soul to find.
A timeless journey fills our being. The blind man now becomes all-seeing.
The lonely now becomes the lover. The childless wife a loving mother.
Reflection of our dormant fears Once woken may reduce to tears.
With sleep the master free to prey On untold thought which nightly stray.
ART: https://www.artstation.com/fannibajer POEM: "Dream" by Jane A Beresford
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos
